title: Concept brief: seeded lifecycle trace starter
hypothesis: If the starter workspace includes one fully linked discovery item, teams will understand the ProductOS trace model faster and adapt it with less confusion.
positioning_hypothesis: The starter should position ProductOS as a structured operating model rather than a generic template collection.
offering_hypothesis: The offering is a seeded and readable starter workspace, not an empty scaffold.
wedge_hypothesis: A concrete lifecycle trace is the clearest niche wedge for starter adoption.
why_now: V5 introduces lifecycle traceability as a first-class capability and needs a reusable adoption baseline.
why_us: The starter workspace is the cleanest way to demonstrate ProductOS outside the self-hosting workspace.
advantage_hypothesis: A seeded, readable discovery path lowers adoption friction more than an empty scaffold.
must_be_true_assumptions: A seeded example is easier to learn from than an empty starter
The starter remains adaptable even with a strong opinionated example
